ideation: This animation sequence expresses the feeling of love and affection associated with the red heart emoji. It starts with the arms at the sides, then moves to a gesture similar to embracing oneself, suggesting self-love or contentment. The final frame shows the arms returning to a relaxed, resting position. The movement is slow and deliberate, emphasizing the tender emotion.  The sequence focuses on the inward movement of the arms, mimicking an embrace. The arms will not move independently of each other.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, content and calm
arms slowly rise and cross, a gentle self-embrace
the embrace tightens slightly, holding the feeling
arms return to rest, love settles within
